chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.A. No.70 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ HEARING CASE (PRIORITY): 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3848/2023. ----------- Dated; 22nd October 2025 Mr. Naseer Nehal Hashmi, Advocate for Appellant. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for appellant submits that this appeal was filed against the execution proceedings in Summary Suit No.19 of 2022, which has been withdrawn and disposed of by the executing Court vide order dated 25.09.2025. He has placed certified copy of the order and does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Learned counsel requests for return of surety. Let report be called from Nazir in this regard within two weeks. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
